message:
chore: bump version to 0.5.0 for release

Prepare release v0.5.0 which includes:
- DCG (Destructive Command Guard) full integration
- RU (Repo Updater) full integration
- Enhanced onboarding with file locking and dynamic lesson counts
- Error boundary for lesson rendering
- IPv6 zone ID validation security fix
- Comprehensive test suites for DCG and RU
- Various bug fixes and improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
